description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-focus-ring`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 16 defects — 3 P0, 4 P1, 9 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 01: Hardcoded hex color in CSS
- [ ] [P0] 02: Hardcoded pixel fallbacks for width and offset
- [ ] [P0] 03: No dark mode contrast handling (WCAG 2.4.11 risk)

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-focus-ring
